use_cases: Display status indicators with color-coded variants for user feedback
Tag content with labels for categorization and filtering in interfaces
Highlight new or featured items with visual prominence on cards
Show counts or metadata alongside content elements
Indicate user roles, permissions, or categories in UI elements
ai_summary: A lightweight badge component with four style variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) for displaying labels, tags, and status indicators. Features standard hover and focus states with accessibility support via focus-ring styling. Built with class-variance-authority for flexible variant management and designed for universal use across web applications for categorizing content, highlighting features, or indicating status.
